O,z=-806194-(-806195),b[827680-827679]while z do M[z],O=M[z]-(935785+-935784),(537215+-537214)+O if 186559+-186559==M[z]then M[z],j[z]=nil,nil end z=b[O]end end return(R(-580818+5094108,{}))(W(J))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[O(-354789+365448)],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
